author: pd-codes
name: channeljoinnotification
short: DM notification when joining configured channels
description: Sends a DM with a customizable text when users join specific voice/stage channels. Includes an ephemeral setup UI and a guild dashboard page.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-guild channel notification settings (channel id, enabled flag, message template). No user data is stored.
install_msg: ChannelJoinNotification loaded. Set it up with /join-notification or via the web dashboard.
